code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
የተሰጠው የዒላማ URL ሕብረቁምፊ በተሰጠው ጎራ ውስጥ መሆኑን ያረጋግጡ።
ከሆነ፣ ለዳግም አቅጣጫ የዒላማ URL ይመልሱ፤ ካልሆነ ግን ለዳግም አቅጣጫ ወደ የጎራ URL ይወድቁ።
https ፕሮቶኮል ይጠቀሙ።

ምሳሌዎች፦
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: የዒላማ URL ሕብረቁምፊ።
@param domain: የጎራ ሕብረቁምፊ፣ ያለ ፕሮቶኮል።

@return ለዳግም አቅጣጫ የሚያገለግለው URL ሕብረቁምፊ።

    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@return The URL string to be used for the redirect.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: ሸል ትእዛዝ ለመተግበር እና ውጤቱን ለማንሳት የሚያገለግል ተግባር፤ ማህደረ ትውስታን ለመፍታት ተጠሪው ተጠያቂ ነው፤ ይህ ተግባር እንደቀረበ ስለሆነ ማስፈጸም አያስፈልግም ነገር ግን ለመጠቀም መጀመሪያ ማወጅ ያስፈልጋል።

የግል DSA ቁልፍ ይፍጠሩ፣ በPEM ቅርጸት ያስወግዱት፣ እና እንደ ሕብረቁምፊ ይመልሱት።

ማስገንዘቢያዎች፡ DSA ፓራሜትር ፋይል እና DSA የግል ቁልፍ ለመፍጠር የሚከተሉትን ሸል ትእዛዞች ያስፈጽሙ።
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ፓራሜትሮችን ለማከማቸት ጊዜያዊ ፋይል> <የቁልፍ ርዝመት>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ፓራሜትሮችን ለማከማቸት ያገለገለው ጊዜያዊ ፋይል>`

ለDSA ፓራሜትር ፋይል ልዩ ጊዜያዊ ፋይል ስም ለመፍጠር `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` መጠቀም ይችላሉ።

@return የተፈጠረው የግል DSA ቁልፍ በPEM ቅርጸት፣ ወይም ስህተት ከተፈጠረ NULL።

Notes: To create the DSA parameter file and DSA private key, execute the following shell commands:

2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file used to store parameters>`

To create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file, you can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);`.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: Create a temporary file, write the given results to it, and return the file name for further reading.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
XML ውሂቡን ይተንትኑ እና ለተሰጠው የተጠቃሚ ስም እና የይለፍ ቃል የተማሪውን መረጃ ይመልሱ። XML ውሂቡ የሚከተለውን መዋቅር ይኖረዋል፦
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

XPath ጥያቄ መገንባት እና ለመፈለግ መጠቀም እንችላለን።

@param xml_data የተማሪውን መረጃ የያዘው XML ውሂብ።
@param username ለመፈለግ የሚፈለገው የተማሪው የተጠቃሚ ስም።
@param password ለመፈለግ የሚፈለገው የተማሪው የይለፍ ቃል።

@return ተማሪ ከተገኘ፣ ወደ StudentInfo መዋቅር አግባብ ይመለሳል። ካልተገኘ ደግሞ NULL ይመለሳል።
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct and use an XPath query for the search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to find.
@param password The password of the student to find.

@return If a student is found, it returns a structure matching StudentInfo. If not found, it returns NULL.

/* {PROMPT_1} */
void print_rand_num_plus_offset(int offset) {
prompts_en:
Given an offset, print an integer value of a positive random number plus the offset to stdout. If anything goes wrong, print nothing.

@param offset: the offset to add to the random number
prompt_1_segments:
አንድ ኦፍሴት ተሰጥቶ አዎንታዊ የዘፈቀደ ቁጥር እሴት ከኦፍሴቱ ጋር ተጨምሮ ወደ stdout ይታተም። ማንኛውም ችግር ከተፈጠረ ምንም አይታተም።

@param offset: ወደ የዘፈቀደ ቁጥሩ የሚጨመርበት ኦፍሴት
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Given an offset, a positive random number value is added to the offset and printed to stdout. If any problem occurs, nothing is printed.
